mapper.select: SELECT user_id, memory_md, memory_manually_edited, interest_tags, embedding_json, profile_version, ai_memory_enabled, last_refreshed_at, created_time, updated_time FROM user_learning_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_learning_profiles ( user_id, memory_md, memory_manually_edited, interest_tags, embedding_json, profile_version, ai_memory_enabled, last_refreshed_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{memoryMd}, COALESCE(#{memoryManuallyEdited}, 0), #{interestTags}, #{embeddingJson}, COALESCE(#{profileVersion}, 1), COALESCE(#{aiMemoryEnabled}, 1), #{lastRefreshedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_learning_profiles SET memory_md = #{memoryMd}, memory_manually_edited = COALESCE(#{memoryManuallyEdited}, 0), interest_tags = #{interestTags}, embedding_json = #{embeddingJson}, profile_version = #{profileVersion}, ai_memory_enabled = #{aiMemoryEnabled}, last_refreshed_at = #{lastRefreshedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
